hero_subtitle: SFTY Business streamlines compliance by preserving complete human review histories and decision logs across onboarding, risk screening, and case workflows for VASPs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to preserve clear human review histories for high-risk cases across multiple disconnected tools. This weakens audit trail integrity and makes it harder to reconstruct case decisions during reviews or regulatory inspections.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY preserves detailed decision logs and reviewer actions within a unified compliance workflow, enabling VASP operations teams to maintain clear, auditable records of high-risk case reviews and supporting evidence.
workflow_title: From provider checks to decision logs
workflow_description: SFTY routes provider outputs through risk-based reviews, case creation, human decision logs and evidence preservation within a controlled compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond manual reviews. One evidence layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY preserves human review history and links provider outputs to workflows, decisions, cases and audit-ready evidence for clearer, defensible compliance operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides regulated digital asset teams with a controlled layer to preserve human review logs, connect provider inputs and support audit-ready compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How does SFTY preserve human review logs for cases
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how decision logs support compliance case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence captures reviewer actions and decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for secure compliance workflow automation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance workflows?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures provider outputs into automated workflows that apply internal rules, route reviews, create cases, record decisions and prepare reports for regulated digital asset compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle decision logs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY records human review history and decision logs within cases to support clear traceability of compliance actions on high-risk or sensitive transactions and alerts.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in an audit-ready environment to support inspection readiness and compliance traceability.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational layer without disrupting existing provider relationships or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing compliance providers, turning their outputs into structured reviews, workflows, evidence and reports instead of replacing those providers.
final_title: Preserve human reviews and decision logs securely
final_description: Review how SFTY supports audit-ready human review histories and structured decision logs across compliance workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
